No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (4.3), develops professional skills for employment (4.4), and fosters cultural understanding through cross-cultural translation (4.7).
evidence: cultivate students' professional Thai translation skills

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops professional translation skills for future employment (8.5) and includes translating tourism and business texts, supporting job creation and economic productivity (8.2, 8.3, 8.9).
evidence: Translation of Tourism and Service Industry Texts
Translation of Technical and Business Texts

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Translating technical and business texts, including manuals, facilitates knowledge transfer and supports domestic technology development and innovation across industries (9.b).
evidence: Translation of Technical and Business Texts

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on cross-cultural translation and fostering an international perspective helps bridge communication gaps, thereby promoting social and cultural inclusion (10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's module on 'Translation of Literary and Cultural Texts' directly contributes to safeguarding and promoting the world's cultural heritage by making it accessible across languages (11.4).
evidence: Translation of Literary and Cultural Texts

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course promotes public access to information by teaching translation of news and media texts (16.10) and upholds the rule of law through its emphasis on respecting copyright (16.3).
evidence: Translation of News and Media Texts

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course builds professional translation capacity and fosters an international perspective, which are fundamental for enhancing international cooperation and knowledge sharing across cultures (17.6).
